title: Welsh Government Publishes Strategic Hydrogen Policy
content: Rebecca Evans, Cabinet Secretary for Economy, Energy and Planning, has published the Welsh Government's hydrogen policy. Capitalizing on Wales' renewable energy resources, the policy aims to deploy hydrogen to decarbonize hard-to-electrify sectors like heavy industry and transport while generating economic benefits. Following a public consultation and advice from the Climate Change Committee, the policy aligns with the UK Low Carbon Hydrogen Standard (LCHS) and business models, enabling Welsh developers to access funding. It encourages investment in projects that meet LCHS requirements, contribute to net-zero targets, and avoid unsustainable fossil fuel use. By focusing on emissions intensity rather than specific technologies, the policy fosters innovation. This strategic framework seeks to retain sustainable industries, create high-quality jobs, and support the transition to a decarbonized future, with further guidance on planning policy to follow.
author: Analysts Account
